name: GC Rieber Shipping ASA
summary: GC Rieber Shipping ASA engages in the design, development, and maritime operation of offshore vessels within the offshore/shipping business in Norway, Great Britain, Germany, Africa, and rest of Europe. It operates through Subsea & Renewables and Ice/Support segments. The company owns and operates subsea and renewable vessels that are primarily used for construction, inspection, maintenance, and repair of subsea installations and cables, as well as offers marine ship management and project development services. It operates 13 vessels and has direct and indirect ownership of 29 advanced special purpose vessels. The company was founded in 1879 and is headquartered in Bergen, Norway. GC Rieber Shipping ASA is a subsidiary of GC Rieber AS.
